# Backlog
id: backlog-inline
- [ ] Unique title uses registry id
id: item-unique

# Review
id: review-inline-a
- [ ] First duplicate title
id: item-review-a

# Review
id: review-inline-b
- [ ] Second duplicate title
id: item-review-b

# Review
id: review-inline-c
- [ ] Third duplicate title falls back inline
id: item-review-c
